message:
fix(cards): standardize red/green color shades per design system (fixes #9881) (#9885)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -455,12 +455,13 @@ export function HardwareHealthCard() { )} {/* Status Summary */} + {/* #9881 — Normalize tile backgrounds to the design-system pattern (bg-*-500/10 + border-*-500/20). */}
0 - ? 'bg-red-500/20 border-red-500/20' - : 'bg-green-500/20 border-green-500/20' + ? 'bg-red-500/10 border-red-500/20' + : 'bg-green-500/10 border-green-500/20' )}>
{criticalCount}
0 ? 'text-red-400' : 'text-green-400')}> @@ -470,8 +471,8 @@ export function HardwareHealthCard() {
0 - ? 'bg-yellow-500/20 border-yellow-500/20' - : 'bg-green-500/20 border-green-500/20' + ? 'bg-yellow-500/10 border-yellow-500/20' + : 'bg-green-500/10 border-green-500/20' )}>
{warningCount}
0 ? 'text-yellow-400' : 'text-green-400')}>
